problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: The key to Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved is Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization — specifically Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient — which would help 1,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
